sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2022-01-01');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT isoyear(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, isoyear(event_date) AS iso_year FROM test_dates;
